title: Demogorgon Mod
description: Adds a strange creature, and more to your Minecraft experience!
body:
![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/hMh4WnB.png)

![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/KwppaaU.png)

GECKOLIB REQUIRED!

This mod will not work without GeckoLib!

You will need GeckoLib for all versions of the mod (1.19.2, 1.19.4 and 1.20.1)

 ![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/KwppaaU.png)

The Demogorgon

The Demogorgon has strangely found it's way into your Minecraft world!

It spawns in the Blighted Forest biome! The Blight has infected wood and grass, and a perfect place for a Demogorgon to live in due to the cold environment!

The Demogorgon hates fire! Set it on fire and it will deal more damage, and fear you!

Demogorgon shack structures can spawn, with toolsmith loot and a dangerous Demogorgon spawner! You can break it or use it to your advantage...

![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/KwppaaU.png)

The Tech

To make flashlights and a artificial redstone lamp, you will need batteries. You can generate batteries from the Redstone Generator. Once you have crafted your generator, you can right click to toggle it on and off. You have to shift right click to open the GUI, but the Redstone Generator has requirements for this. The block needs to be exposed to the sky, so no blocks apart from transparent blocks above it, and the weather needs to be raining or thunder so the block can summon lightning. Once the GUI is opened, put a Battery Shell in the left slot, click the button and and you will get your Battery. The battery is the only crafting recipe which you would not be able to view in JEI, so you can use that to figure

![This is an image](https://i.imgur.com/KwppaaU.png)

Links

If you would like to say anything related to the mod, please either use the comments on the project, or for a quicker response, join my discord using the link below!

Discord - https://discord.gg/GnWt4HeZUh

Alternative mod download page:

CurseForge - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/demogorgon
